verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Confitemini Domino, quoniam bonus,  quoniam in sæculum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹד֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה כִּי־ט֑וֹב כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: because his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dicat nunc Israël : Quoniam bonus,  quoniam in sæculum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֹאמַר־נָ֥א יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Let Israel now say, that his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dicat nunc domus Aaron :  Quoniam in sæculum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֹאמְרוּ־נָ֥א בֵֽית־אַהֲרֹ֑ן כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Let the house of Aaron now say, that his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dicant nunc qui timent Dominum :  Quoniam in sæculum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֹאמְרוּ־נָ֭א יִרְאֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Let them now that fear the Lord say, that his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: De tribulatione invocavi Dominum,  et exaudivit me in latitudine Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִֽן־הַ֭מֵּצַר קָרָ֣אתִי יָּ֑הּ עָנָ֖נִי בַמֶּרְחָ֣ב יָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: I called upon the Lord in distress: the Lord answered me, and set me in a large place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus mihi adjutor ;  non timebo quid faciat mihi homo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה לִ֭י לֹ֣א אִירָ֑א מַה־יַּעֲשֶׂ֖ה לִ֣י אָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The Lord is on my side; I will not fear: what can man do unto me?

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus mihi adjutor,  et ego despiciam inimicos meos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה לִ֭י בְּעֹזְרָ֑י וַ֝אֲנִ֗י אֶרְאֶ֥ה בְשֹׂנְאָֽי׃
verses.king_james: The Lord taketh my part with them that help me: therefore shall I see my desire upon them that hate me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bonum est confidere in Domino,  quam confidere in homine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ט֗וֹב לַחֲס֥וֹת בַּיהֹוָ֑ה מִ֝בְּטֹ֗חַ בָּאָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: It is better to trust in the Lord than to put confidence in man.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bonum est sperare in Domino,  quam sperare in principibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ט֗וֹב לַחֲס֥וֹת בַּיהֹוָ֑ה מִ֝בְּטֹ֗חַ בִּנְדִיבִֽים׃
verses.king_james: It is better to trust in the Lord than to put confidence in princes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes gentes circuierunt me,  et in nomine Domini, quia ultus sum in eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־גּוֹיִ֥ם סְבָב֑וּנִי בְּשֵׁ֥ם יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה כִּ֣י אֲמִילַֽם׃
verses.king_james: All nations compassed me about: but in the name of the Lord will I destroy them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Circumdantes circumdederunt me,  et in nomine Domini, quia ultus sum in eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סַבּ֥וּנִי גַם־סְבָב֑וּנִי בְּשֵׁ֥ם יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה כִּ֣י אֲמִילַֽם׃
verses.king_james: They compassed me about; yea, they compassed me about: but in the name of the Lord I will destroy them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Circumdederunt me sicut apes,  et exarserunt sicut ignis in spinis :  et in nomine Domini, quia ultus sum in eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סַבּ֤וּנִי כִדְבוֹרִ֗ים דֹּ֭עֲכוּ כְּאֵ֣שׁ קוֹצִ֑ים בְּשֵׁ֥ם יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה כִּ֣י אֲמִילַֽם׃
verses.king_james: They compassed me about like bees; they are quenched as the fire of thorns: for in the name of the Lord I will destroy them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Impulsus eversus sum, ut caderem,  et Dominus suscepit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דַּחֹ֣ה דְחִיתַ֣נִי לִנְפֹּ֑ל וַ֖יהֹוָ֣ה עֲזָרָֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast thrust sore at me that I might fall: but the Lord helped me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fortitudo mea et laus mea Dominus,  et factus est mihi in salutem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עׇזִּ֣י וְזִמְרָ֣ת יָ֑הּ וַֽיְהִי־לִ֝֗י לִישׁוּעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The Lord is my strength and song, and is become my salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vox exsultationis et salutis  in tabernaculis justorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֤וֹל ׀ רִנָּ֬ה וִישׁוּעָ֗ה בְּאׇהֳלֵ֥י צַדִּיקִ֑ים יְמִ֥ין יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה עֹ֣שָׂה חָֽיִל׃
verses.king_james: The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tabernacles of the righteous: the right hand of the Lord doeth valiantly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dextera Domini fecit virtutem ;  dextera Domini exaltavit me :  dextera Domini fecit virtutem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְמִ֣ין יְ֭הֹוָה רוֹמֵמָ֑ה יְמִ֥ין יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה עֹ֣שָׂה חָֽיִל׃
verses.king_james: The right hand of the Lord is exalted: the right hand of the Lord doeth valiantly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non moriar, sed vivam,  et narrabo opera Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־אָמ֥וּת כִּֽי־אֶחְיֶ֑ה וַ֝אֲסַפֵּ֗ר מַעֲשֵׂ֥י יָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: I shall not die, but live, and declare the works of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Castigans castigavit me Dominus,  et morti non tradidit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַסֹּ֣ר יִסְּרַ֣נִּי יָּ֑הּ וְ֝לַמָּ֗וֶת לֹ֣א נְתָנָֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: The Lord hath chastened me sore: but he hath not given me over unto death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aperite mihi portas justitiæ :  ingressus in eas confitebor Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פִּתְחוּ־לִ֥י שַׁעֲרֵי־צֶ֑דֶק אָבֹא־בָ֝֗ם אוֹדֶ֥ה יָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: Open to me the gates of righteousness: I will go into them, and I will praise the Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc porta Domini :  justi intrabunt in eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶה־הַשַּׁ֥עַר לַיהֹוָ֑ה צַ֝דִּיקִ֗ים יָבֹ֥אוּ בֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: This gate of the Lord, into which the righteous shall enter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitebor tibi quoniam exaudisti me,  et factus es mihi in salutem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: א֭וֹדְךָ כִּ֣י עֲנִיתָ֑נִי וַתְּהִי־לִ֝֗י לִישׁוּעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: I will praise thee: for thou hast heard me, and art become my salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lapidem quem reprobaverunt ædificantes,  hic factus est in caput anguli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶ֭בֶן מָאֲס֣וּ הַבּוֹנִ֑ים הָ֝יְתָ֗ה לְרֹ֣אשׁ פִּנָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: The stone which the builders refused is become the head stone of the corner.

verses.latin_vulgate: A Domino factum est istud,  et est mirabile in oculis nostris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵאֵ֣ת יְ֭הֹוָה הָ֣יְתָה זֹּ֑את הִ֖יא נִפְלָ֣את בְּעֵינֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: This is the Lord’s doing; it is marvellous in our eyes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est dies quam fecit Dominus ;  exsultemus, et lætemur in ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶה־הַ֭יּוֹם עָשָׂ֣ה יְהֹוָ֑ה נָגִ֖ילָה וְנִשְׂמְחָ֣ה בֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: This is the day which the Lord hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.

verses.latin_vulgate: O Domine, salvum me fac ;  o Domine, bene prosperare.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָנָּ֣א יְ֭הֹוָה הוֹשִׁ֘יעָ֥ה נָּ֑א אָנָּ֥א יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה הַצְלִ֘יחָ֥ה נָּֽא׃
verses.king_james: Save now, I beseech thee, O Lord: O Lord, I beseech thee, send now prosperity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus qui venit in nomine Domini :  benediximus vobis de domo Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּר֣וּךְ הַ֭בָּא בְּשֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָ֑ה בֵּ֝רַ֥כְנוּכֶ֗ם מִבֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Blessed be he that cometh in the name of the Lord: we have blessed you out of the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus Dominus, et illuxit nobis.  Constituite diem solemnem in condensis,  usque ad cornu altaris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֤ל ׀ יְהֹוָה֮ וַיָּ֢אֶ֫ר לָ֥נוּ אִסְרוּ־חַ֥ג בַּעֲבֹתִ֑ים עַד־קַ֝רְנ֗וֹת הַמִּזְבֵּֽחַ׃
verses.king_james: God is the Lord, which hath shewed us light: bind the sacrifice with cords, even unto the horns of the altar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus meus es tu, et confitebor tibi ;  Deus meus es tu, et exaltabo te.  Confitebor tibi quoniam exaudisti me,  et factus es mihi in salutem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵלִ֣י אַתָּ֣ה וְאוֹדֶ֑ךָּ אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י אֲרוֹמְמֶֽךָּ׃
verses.king_james: Thou art my God, and I will praise thee: thou art my God, I will exalt thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitemini Domino, quoniam bonus,  quoniam in sæculum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹד֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה כִּי־ט֑וֹב כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
